title: townsendia alpina
intro: Townsendia alpina, also known as Mountain Blazing Star or Mountain Sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Townsendia alpina include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Townsendia alpina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications for its medicinal properties.
